crossChainShield(uint256,uint256,bytes32.details: Burns USDC via CCTP, Hub will create commitment in merkle tree

params.destinationCaller: Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Hub (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.
params.maxFee: Maximum CCTP relayer fee (deducted at protocol level, 0 = no fee)

params.finalityThresholdExecuted: The finality threshold that was met
params.sender: Sender address on source domain (as bytes32)

returns.success: Whether the message was handled successfully
